[`definitions/choir-audited-autoputer-construction-2026-07-15.md`](definitions/choir-audited-autoputer-construction-2026-07-15.md) completed audited fleet-wide ComputerVersion construction, D-ROUTE cutover, rollback, reconstruction, and no-SSH product inspection. The superseded [`definitions/choir-autoputer-completion-2026-07-14.md`](definitions/choir-autoputer-completion-2026-07-14.md) remains historical evidence. Its runtime and lifecycle receipts remain citable, but its completion framing was falsified by the deployed opaque-disk outage. Do not execute it.
